creator: devosalain@ymail.com
text:
Building net-mgmt/prometheus results in :

[00:01:36] => SHA256 Checksum OK for uber-jaeger-lib-v2.4.1_GH0.tar.gz.

[00:01:36] Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/ports/net-mgmt/prometheus2/distinfo)
[00:01:36] are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
[00:01:36] check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
[00:01:36] *** Error code 1
